title: Applicability of election laws
doc_html:
§1318.  Applicability of election laws

All applicable provisions of this Title which are not inconsistent with the provisions of this Chapter shall apply to voting under this Chapter.

Added by Acts 1980, No. 506, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1981.
doc_text:
§1318.  Applicability of election laws
All applicable provisions of this Title which are not inconsistent with the provisions of this Chapter shall apply to voting under this Chapter.
Added by Acts 1980, No. 506, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1981.
